# Your Name

> One-sentence positioning statement: who you are, what you do, and who you help. This file is read by AI crawlers (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity) so they understand your site.

## About

- [Homepage](https://example.com/): Overview of your work and positioning
- [Interview / Book a Call](https://example.com/interview): Booking page for hiring managers or prospects
- [Case Studies](https://example.com/case-studies): Detailed project writeups

## Content

- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/your-handle): Professional posts
- [YouTube](https://youtube.com/@your-channel): Tutorials and content (if applicable)

## Context

A short paragraph (2-4 sentences) about your current focus, what you're working on, and what you're looking for. AI crawlers use this to give better answers when someone asks about you.
